initial_clearing_float_eur.rationale: Base at the plan's stated EUR 200M float for the busiest corridors. Spread reflects the Review Plan's noted dependency on peak-daily-obligation sizing and Issue 2's flag that the float may need recapitalisation if velocity is low.

clearing_liquidity_shock_eur.rationale: Stress-test magnitude from the Premortem and Review Plan: EUR 50-200M working-capital gap if clearing under-capitalises. Triangular over the stated band; no anchor for a wider tail.

eligible_cross_border_journeys_per_year.rationale: Eurostat cross-border passenger rail volumes for EU put plausible eligible cross-border journeys in the tens to low hundreds of millions per year; wide spread reflects definitional ambiguity (point-to-point vs. ticket count).

projected_through_ticket_adoption_fracti.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 0.40 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a shift. Low-side spread reflects Risk 7 (distributor adoption friction) and Risk 1 (operator non-compliance); high capped under 0.6 as a stretch ceiling.

peak_daily_clearing_obligation_eur.rationale: Plan's EUR 200M float sized for busiest corridors implies peak daily obligation broadly in this band; spread reflects uncertainty about velocity and corridor scope expansion.

monthly_fte_cost_eur.rationale: EU institution and seconded national-regulator senior technical/policy staff typically cost 10-20k EUR per FTE per month fully loaded (salary, benefits, overhead, travel).

residual_program_overhead_eur.rationale: Unallocated coordination-fund spend (testing audits, legal, contingency) typically 3-15% of a multi-year EU program envelope; here roughly EUR 50-200M against the EUR 1.5B fund after named line items.
